title: Update oscore.h documentation for persist_ssn, NVM callbacks, and failure semantics
description: Enhance doxygen comments for oscore_ctx_persist_ssn(), oscore_nvm_register_callbacks(), error codes, and security guarantees around SSN persistence and nonce uniqueness on NVM failures. Reference the new retry/bump behavior. See lines 430+, 266+, 144+.
close_reason: Documentation updated for NVM failure semantics, retry/bump behavior, SSN persistence guarantees, and related functions per parent implementation.
